item.title: Someone messaged me to tell me to leave America, and accused me of being a terrorist...
item.description:
This person not only thinks all Etsy shops are US-based but also wasted time accusing me of being a terrorist based on my silly needlework. The thing is: I live in Europe.
This is clearly stated in my shop lol https://rebordacaoembroidery.etsy.com
How can someone be so pissed and feel threatened by this little cutie?
The best part is: I never specified a government, but the person automatically assumed I was talking about the USA.
Lots of people around the world aren’t happy with their current governments, so I make this piece in other languages too. It’s just a sassy needlework of a cat holding a “meowlotov” cocktail, not an anarchist manifesto. Wishing you all a great week ahead!
item.dc:creator: rebordacao

24
25 BOM BOKO
#26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: The absolutely wonderful art of @Patricbates I hope he doesn't mind my sharing it.
#27 Man Tax: Kayne Lawton
Happy birthday to me, for a few more hours, anyway. I old. “There is nothing like looking, if you want to find something. You certainly usually find something, if you look, but it is not always quite the something you were after.” ― J.R.R. Tolkien, The Hobbit, or There and Back Again I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movies & tv and, apparently, plucked chicken buttholes. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: RIP Tom Lehrer, who played a prank so sneaky nobody realized it for sixty years
item.description:
Here’s the song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qU_j5cQ2sfQ
Here’s the paper: https://media.defense.gov/2021/Jul/14/2002762807/-1/-1/0/GAMBLERS-RUIN.PDF/GAMBLERS-RUIN.PDF
Also, Tom Lehrer is credited with inventing the modern Jell-O shot. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jello_shot#History
Here’s that song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV11OefIOgM https://bsky.app/profile/opalescentopal.bsky.social/post/3luxxx27nos23 Fookin’ legend.
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Anne Frank was photographed with her sister Margot at the beach in Zandvoort in the Netherlands in 1940.Margot was the older sister, quiet and serious, and while Anne’s diary became one of the most read accounts of the Holocaust
item.description: Anne Frank was photographed with her sister Margot at the beach in Zandvoort in the Netherlands in 1940. Margot was the older sister, quiet and serious, and while Anne’s diary became one of the most read accounts of the Holocaust, Margot also kept a diary of her own during their time in hiding. Sadly, no trace of Margot’s diary was ever found after the war. Margot, like Anne, was deported after the family’s hiding place was discovered in 1944. The sisters were eventually sent to the Bergen Belsen concentration camp, where they both perished of illness and starvation in early 1945, just weeks before the camp was liberated. On April 5, 1944, Anne Frank wrote in her diary: “When I write I can shake off all my cares. My sorrow disappears, my spirits are revived! But, and that’s a big question, will I ever write be able to write something great, will I ever become a journalist or a writer?“
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Update to an update for the update (check my previous posts)
item.description: That went a bit faster than expected though the whole process of suing them will probably gonna last long. Especially that they are getting charged up the ass for their scams. Apparently they cheated a lot of people around in many different ways. Well this is about to end. I'm doing kinda ok, all this costs a lot and I am barely scraping by but I am scraping by. Couple months probably till I actually work myself back but doing all I can. I'm working two jobs today so might be very slow to respond to comments until I come back home at night
item.dc:creator: TyrCarter

item.title: California GOP Candidate Calls Auschwitz a “Solution,” Gets Only Platform He Deserves: None
item.description:
“* **** ** **** ****** *** ***’* *** ** **,” said Langford, a wannabe nazi piece of dog shit, who would throw your family in prison or in front of a firing squad if they disagree with his fascist ideology. “**’** **** ** **** ***, * ******* ** *** ** *******.”
“Alpine 6 Action News does not platform fascists. We do not present “both sides” of genocide. We do not “contextualize” calls for state-run murder factories. Kyle Langford is a fascist. Not a “provocateur,” not a “populist,” not a “fringe conservative.” He is a man running for office on a platform that includes the mass incarceration and murder of vulnerable people. His speech is not a policy disagreement. It is a threat. And like every fascist before him, he’s using democracy only long enough to dismantle it.” - It’s around this point I’d say this article is satire, and while AP6 does post almost entirely satire, I feel the usual tags have no place here. The only platform this nazi will get is the one built to support the gallows where he shall hang from his hubris, if not a rough spun rope. https://alpine6.com/2025/07/28/california-gop-candidate-calls-auschwitz-a-solution-gets-only-platform-he-deserves-none/
item.dc:creator: ItsActuallyDavidNow

item.title: Not good
item.description: My cat had been heading downhill, and had a vet appt. Scheduled for Monday morning. The Saturday before we thought he had gotten outside and disappeared. Fast forward 2 weeks and there's a horrid smell coming from the laundry room. Spent hours tracking the smell to behind a wall in the laundry room. After ripping off half the drywall and pulling out insulation I found him. He's been my shadow for the past 5 years, we had no idea how old he was when we got him. He was the best, most cuddly, gentle sweet boy and my heart is breaking while typing this.
item.dc:creator: Blueb3

item.title: We are the bad place
item.description: The current Administration is held bent on making a perceived enemy out of nothing. That they're abandoning United States citizens for the bigoted Playbook they're running Front page. So my living situation is not exactly stable. Recovering from homelessness. And that's my phone has made it illegal to be homeless. I'm a disabled combat veteran, and my wife is terminally ill. The programs that I moved across the country for got shut down due to lack of fun and thanks to the executive order written on January 20th. I'm tired of almost getting there and then getting knocked right back on my ass. They've also made it possible for creditors to start putting things back on reports, even though it dropped off more than 8 years ago. My credit has tanked randomly and all the work I did for the last 5 years has gone out the window. They quite literally are trying to make it impossible for anybody to survive. Especially if you have a left-leaning bias. I'm so very tired of all this. I don't know when I serve this country for. Because this is certainly not the country that I once believed in. Depressed and not sure how much longer I want to stay on this ride
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
OOOOO!!!
Uncle Buck knows how to boogie. Oh and check out Cool Runnings (again), shit aged like a pricey cheese
The new Superman was fine. I never thought he was that interesting of a character. Mr Terrific was great, but I don't think he could hold everyone's attention for a whole solo movie. I'm going to see every movie Gunn directs opening weekend probably til I die. I'm not sure if these are hot takes, but that's all I got for you.

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #178
item.description: Clearance Sale on Democracy Trumpworld is a protection racket where loyalty buys immunity, dissent gets crushed. He forced foreign leaders to negotiate at his golf course under threat, then handed a judgeship to his criminal defense lawyer. That nominee is now under two whistleblower complaints for telling DOJ staff to ignore court orders. And while billionaires get tax cuts, social programs for the rest of us are gutted. No wonder Trump’s approval has tanked down to 37%. This is what it costs to sell out a democracy. And the bill is coming due. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-eu-trade-deal 2. https://go.govbrief.today/cambodia-thailand-peace-talks 3. https://go.govbrief.today/paul-biden-fauci-pardon 4. https://go.govbrief.today/new-whistleblower-bove-nomination Yesterday's Most Popular - https://go.govbrief.today/doge-ai-cut-regulations Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/trump-approval-drops-again Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
